name: Address Book
shortDescription: Maintain an address book of SPL tokens and NFT collections with tiered data (metadata, holder snapshots, and more).
longDescription: The Address Book gives admins a centralised list of SPL and NFT mints for their dGuild. Each mint can be at Base (metadata only, free), Grow (metadata + daily holder snapshots, 5 USDC/month), or Pro (full indexing – coming soon, 25 USDC/month). The address book feeds every mint input across the dapp and can be shared with members via a whitelist.
detailedDescription: Admins add mints via the unified picker and assign a tier. Base mints are free and show metadata only. Grow mints get weekly metadata refresh and daily holder snapshots. Pro mints (coming soon) will add transfer/mint/burn indexing. Admins choose a whitelist; those wallets plus admins can view the address book and open each entry to see metadata and, for Grow+, daily snapshots.
keyInfo: - Base: metadata only; Grow: + daily snapshots; Pro: + transactions (coming soon)

activationInstructions.intro: Catalogue your realm's assets. Share with members who need it.
steps: Add SPL tokens or NFT collections
Set tier per mint (Base or Grow)
Optionally select a whitelist for member access
activationInstructions.note: Pro tier is visible but not selectable yet. Grow mints are updated daily for holder snapshots and weekly for metadata.
